title: Lugalbanda in the Mountain Cave
description: Lugalbanda, father of Gilgamesh, is abandoned sick in a cave and saved by the gods.
introduction: Lugalbanda, father of Gilgamesh, is abandoned sick in a cave and saved by the gods.

translation.text: Lugalbanda lay like a wild bull shot with arrows. He prayed to Utu: 'Let me not die here.' The god heard.
